stories.title: U.S. attempt to open Strait of Hormuz tests fragile Iran war ceasefire
stories.description: The Iran war risked reigniting after the U.S. tried to force open the Strait of Hormuz, though a ceasefire seemed to be holding Tuesday even after the United Arab Emirates said Iran fired missiles and drones at it.

stories.title: U.S. tries to force open the Strait of Hormuz as the UAE comes under attack
stories.description: The U.S. military said it fired on Iranian forces and sank six small boats as it moved to reopen the Strait of Hormuz on Monday. The United Arab Emirates said it had come under attack from Iran.

stories.title: Trump says U.S. will 'guide' stranded ships through the Strait. And, key Senate races to watch
stories.description: President Trump announced that the U.S will "guide" stranded ships through the Strait of Hormuz. And, Democrats face an uphill battle to gain Senate control. Here are the key races to watch.

stories.title: Bowen: Strait of Hormuz standoff raises risk of sliding back into all out war
stories.description: The US and Iran's determination to keep the pressure on each other has put the fragile Gulf ceasefire in serious jeopardy.

stories.title: What we know about Trump's 'Project Freedom' in Strait of Hormuz
stories.description: What does the operation entail and could it lead to a resumption of hostilities?

stories.title: US strikes Iranian fast boats as Iran attacks UAE oil facility
stories.description: Shipping company Maersk says one of its US-flagged commercial vessels has successfully exited the Strait of Hormuz under US military protection.

stories.title: Israeli attacks kill dozens within days in Lebanon despite ceasefire
stories.description: The health ministry says 110 people have been killed in Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon since Thursday.

stories.title: Some Iranians fear the regime is now more entrenched - and ready for revenge
stories.description: Ordinary Iranians tell of worry about increased repression by authorities after the war is over.

stories.title: Concern for jailed Iranian Nobel laureate as brother fears she is dying
stories.description: Her family said the 54-year-old had been taken from prison to a local hospital after a sharp deterioration in her health.

stories.title: Thirteen killed in Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon, health ministry says
stories.description: Four women and a child are among the dead, as fighting between Israel and Iran-backed Hezbollah continues despite a ceasefire.

stories.title: Trump repeats that he is 'not happy' with Iran as deadline to seek approval for war looms
stories.description: President Trump said on Friday that said a deal has been hard to reach in part because Iranian leadership was "very confused".

stories.title: Israeli 'double-tap' strike kills three rescue workers in Lebanon, officials say
stories.description: They are among nine people killed in successive attacks on Tuesday, which Israel's military says targeted a Hezbollah commander.

stories.title: Former US officials criticise Pentagon silence on deadly Iran school attack
stories.description: In the two months since the deadly strike, the US defence department has said only that the incident is under investigation.

stories.title: German minesweeper sets sail for possible Hormuz mission
stories.description: A German minesweeper has set sail for the Mediterranean this Monday in preparation for a possible deployment in the Strait of Hormuz. stories.title: UAE says oil facility hit by Iranian drone strike as attacks resume
stories.description: The United Arab Emirates said Monday it came under attack by Iran for the first time since a fragile ceasefire took hold in early April, accusing Iran of sparking a fire at a key oil facility in a drone strike. stories.title: War with Iran threatens to reignite as Trump launches 'Project Freedom'
stories.description: A ceasefire between Iran and the United States was teetering Monday as the two countries traded fire over the strategic Strait of Hormuz, a day after President Donald Trump announced an operation to escort trapped vessels through the strait dubbed “Project Freedom”. stories.title: Truce under threat as Iran, US trade fire in Strait of Hormuz
stories.description: The fragile truce in the Middle East was in jeopardy on Tuesday after the ​U.S. and Iran launched new attacks as they wrestled for control of the Strait of Hormuz. stories.title: Indian pilots demand further probe of last year's Air India crash
stories.description: An Indian pilot group has submitted a letter to the aviation ministry suggesting that electrical failure, and not pilot action, could have caused the deadly Air India crash last year. The submission by the Federation of Indian Pilots (FIP), which has more than 5,000 members, come...

stories.title: Europeans, Canadian PM discuss security amid Trump’s threats
stories.description: YEREVAN: America’s Nato allies put a brave face on Monday on a US decision to withdraw 5,000 troops from Germany, but warned it was proof Europe needs to step up for its own security, and fast. stories.title: Energy crisis fuels calls to cut methane emissions

stories.description: Mr. Trump announced his new “Project Freedom” mission on social media overnight to enable stuck ships to travel through the strait

stories.title: Three Indians injured after fire breaks out in UAE’s Fujairah due to drone attack
stories.description: Three Indian nationals sustained injuries after the fire broke out on the Fujairah Petroleum Industries Zone, following a drone attack from Iran, local media reported
